caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone and is speaking, with his mouth open and hands gesturing as he talks. The background features a wall filled with framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments, including a white t-shirt on a mannequin. In the bottom corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that says "DOSS" and another with the red text "DOSS FELIX TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak and gesture with his hands, while his facial expression and head position shift slightly, reflecting the natural movements of a conversation. The overall environment suggests a podcast or interview recording session in a personalized studio space.
